title: Talisman 2nd Edition - Giveaway
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gVj7YvOUjfc

A Patreon giveaway announcement for an exceptional copy of Talisman 2nd Edition with the rare Timescape expansion.

**The Prize:**
- Complete Talisman 2nd Edition in amazing condition (looks almost unplayed)
- All tokens, standees, character cards, rulebook, FAQ, and board included
- **BONUS**: Complete and pristine copy of **Talisman Timescape** expansion inside!
- Timescape is a super rare expansion

**How to Enter:**
- Join Dungeon Dive Patreon at the $5/month level
- Comment on the Patreon post for this contest
- Contest open worldwide
- Daniel covers $25 of shipping; winner pays difference for international

**Timeline:**
- Contest announced: July 27th, 2021
- Winner drawn: August 10th, 2021

The game was generously donated by a Dungeon Dive viewer. Daniel expresses gratitude for being able to give away one of his all-time favourite games - a title that's in his top 10 adventure games and foundational to his love of fantasy gaming.

A great opportunity for viewers to play their own "Ash versus the Land of Timescape" adventures!
